zh.lifeSummary: 當John Tibetot於1370年出生在英國坎布利其爾布維爾時，他的父親Sir Payne Tibetot17歲，母親Agnes Wroth15歲。他於1408年2月24日與Philippa Talbot結婚。他於1427年被列為steward of the household。他去世於1443年1月27日在英國英格蘭米德萊可艾德蒙頓享年73歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可恩費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Tibetot于1370年出生在英国坎布利其爾布維爾时，他的父亲Sir Payne Tibetot17岁，母亲Agnes Wroth15岁。他于1408年2月24日与Philippa Talbot结婚。他于1427年被列为steward of the household。他去世于1443年1月27日在英国英格兰米德萊可艾德蒙頓享年73岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可恩費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Tibetot was born in 1370, in Burwell, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Sir Payne Tibetot, was 17 and his mother, Agnes Wroth, was 15. He married Philippa Talbot on 24 February 1408. In 1427, his occupation is listed as steward of the household. He died on 27 January 1443, in Edmonton, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Enfield, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Tibetot est né en 1370, à Burwell, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Payne Tibetot, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wroth, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Talbot le 24 février 1408. En 1427, sa profession de son indiquée est steward of the household. Il est décédé le 27 janvier 1443, à Edmonton, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Enfield, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Tibetot 1370 in Burwell, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Payne Tibetot 17 und seine Mutter Agnes Wroth 15. Er hat am 24. Februar 1408 Philippa Talbot geheiratet. 1427 ist sein Beruf als steward of the household aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. Januar 1443 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Edmonton, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Enfield, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Tibetot è nato il nel 1370 nel Burwell, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Payne Tibetot, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Wroth, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Talbot il 24 febbraio 1408. Nel 1427, la sua occupazione è indicata come steward of the household. Morì il 27 gennaio 1443, nel Edmonton, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Enfield, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Tibetotが1370年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアブルウエルで生まれた時，父Sir Payne Tibetotは17歳，母Agnes Wrothは15歳であった。1408年2月24日にPhilippa Talbotと結婚した。1427年，職業はsteward of the householdと記録されている。彼は1443年1月27日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスエドモントンで73歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスエンフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Tibetot(이)가 1370년 영국 캄브리지실르 버웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Payne Tibetot(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Wroth(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1408년 2월 24일 Philippa Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 1427년, 그의 직업은 steward of the household이었다. 그는 1443년 1월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 에드몽에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Tibetot nasceu em 1370, em Burwell, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Payne Tibetot, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Wroth, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Talbot em 24 de fevereiro de 1408. Em 1427, sua profissão aparece como steward of the household. Ele faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1443, em Edmonton, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Tibetot родился в 1370 г. в местности бурвелл, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Payne Tibetot было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wroth, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Talbot 24 февраля 1408 г. В 1427 году он работал по профессии steward of the household. Он умер 27 января 1443 г. в местности эдмонтон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности энфиелд, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Tibetot nació en 1370, en Burwell, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Payne Tibetot, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Agnes Wroth, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Philippa Talbot el 24 de febrero de 1408. En 1427, su ocupación registrada era steward of the household. Murió el 27 de enero de 1443, en Edmonton, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
